description: You are a sustainability analyst comparing sand sourcing options. Create an openLCA Project named 'Sand_Sourcing_Comparison' to analyze the impact of transportation distance using the USLCI database and TRACI 2.1 LCIA methods. The project must utilize a Global Parameter named 'transport_tkm' (default value 1.0) and a process 'Sourced Sand Supply' with an output of 1000 kg 'Sourced Sand Supply' and inputs of 1000 kg 'Sand' (USLCI) and 'Transport, combination truck, diesel powered' (USLCI) linked to the 'transport_tkm' parameter. Configure the project using a product system for this process and define three variants for 'transport_tkm': 'Local' (20), 'Regional' (200), and 'National' (800). Export the project calculation report to '~/LCA_Results/sand_project_report.xlsx'.
